message.content:
@startuml
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign left
skinparam backgroundColor white

box "BL1 common code" #LightGray
participant "bl1_main" as bl1_main
participant "bl_common" as bl_common
end box

box "arm platform code" #LightBlue
participant "fvp_bl1_setup" as fvp
participant "arm_bl1_setup" as arm_bl1
participant "arm_io_storage" as arm_io
end box

box "platform common code" #LightGray
participant "plat_bl1_common" as plat_bl1
participant "fconf" as fconf
end box

bl1_main -> fvp : bl1_platform_setup()
fvp -> arm_bl1 : arm_bl1_platform_setup()
arm_bl1 -> arm_io : plat_arm_io_setup()
note right of arm_io : register and setup fip
arm_bl1 -> fconf : fconf_load_config()
note right of fconf : create and populate an\nimage_desc_t for FW_CONFIG

arm_bl1 -> bl1_main : load_auth_image(FW_CONFIG_ID, &image_info)
note left of bl1_main : load and auth image from fip\nwith info from plat_io_policy

bl1_main -> arm_io : 
arm_io -> fconf : FCONF_GET_PROPERTY(arm, arm_io_policies, tb_fw_cfg)
note right of fconf : use staticaly defined policies in bl1

bl1_main -> fconf : image_info
note right of fconf : get tb_fw_config_dtb from image_info

fconf -> plat_bl1 : bl1_plat_get_image_desc(BL2_IMAGE_ID)
plat_bl1 -> fconf : BL2_IMAGE_DESC
note right of fconf : set ep_info.args.arg0 of BL2_IMAGE_DESC\nto FW_CONFIG base address

fconf -> fvp : 

note over bl1_main, fconf #white : **load & auth, prepare and jump to BL2**

@enduml
